role: Undergraduate Student — B.S. in Engineering Physics

role: Head Teaching Assistant & Lab Instructor (C Programming)

highlights: Led weekly 3-hour laboratory sessions and authored 8 practical assignment modules.

organization: Laboratory of Solid State & Semiconductor Materials

description: Architected and deployed an end-to-end IoT air quality telemetry platform across 4 high-precision university laboratories.

role: Vice President of Technology & Workshop Coordinator

description: Actively seeking challenging summer internship opportunities in scientific software engineering, embedded systems R&D, EDA/semiconductor tool development, or high-performance computing.
